use serde_json::Value;

// GOOD: use .get() with type checks
fn get_user_name(data: &Value) -> Option<String> {
    data.get("user")?
        .get("name")?
        .as_str()
        .map(|s| s.to_string())
}

fn get_nested_value(data: &Value) -> Option<String> {
    data.get("response")?
        .get("data")?
        .get("items")?
        .get(0)?
        .get("value")?
        .as_str()
        .map(|s| s.to_string())
}

fn process_config(config: &Value) -> Result<Config, Error> {
    let server = config.get("server")
        .ok_or(Error::MissingField("server"))?;
    let port = server.get("port")
        .and_then(|v| v.as_u64())
        .ok_or(Error::InvalidField("port"))? as u16;
    let host = server.get("host")
        .and_then(|v| v.as_str())
        .ok_or(Error::InvalidField("host"))?;
    let max_conn = config.get("database")
        .and_then(|d| d.get("max_connections"))
        .and_then(|v| v.as_u64())
        .unwrap_or(10) as u32;

    Ok(Config { port, host: host.to_string(), max_connections: max_conn })
}
